decisions.decision: INFRA-02 CSS output deferred to Phase 2
decisions.rationale: CSS custom properties come from Style Dictionary (Phase 2), not tsup. Phase 1 only produces TS/ESM/CJS outputs. Fixed requirement mapping.

decisions.decision: Composite tokens (typography, elevation) authored in Tokens Studio, not Figma Variables
decisions.rationale: Figma Variables do not support composite types
Research confirmed v2 API change; plans reflect this

decisions.decision: Do not use TypeScript project references with tsup
decisions.rationale: tsup uses esbuild and does not support composite: true; use npm workspaces symlinks instead

decisions.decision: Changesets access must be set to 'public'
decisions.rationale: Default 'restricted' causes 402 on npm publish for @scoped packages

decisions.decision: Use npx storybook@latest init for Storybook setup
decisions.rationale: CLI version (10.3.1) and addon version (8.6.14) appear mismatched; init command resolves compatible versions
